title: Valeo reinvents the bicycle with 48V motor and automatic adaptive transmission
verified_scope: Valeo Smart e-Bike System / Cyclee historical media evidence
key_verified_facts: Article reports Valeo developed a 48 V e-bike motor with integrated automatic adaptive transmission, in cooperation with Effigear. It states the gearbox has seven speeds and the system reaches 130 Nm torque. It describes the system as a way to eliminate derailleur complexity and support e-bike/cargo uses.
limits_or_caveats: Media source, not official Valeo page. Use as historical lead only until official press release or current Cyclee page is verified.

title: The Revonte One combines e-bike motor and CVT in one
key_verified_facts: Search results identify a New Atlas article describing Revonte ONE as an e-bike motor and CVT combined in one. The page itself was not extractable in this pass, so details are not used as confirmed specs.
limits_or_caveats: Not content-verified; retained only as lead. Needs article access, archive, or official Revonte materials before use in comparisons.

title: Avinox/Gobao MGU article direct follow-up
key_verified_facts: The Verge remains the verified secondary source for Avinox MG Concept and Gobao X-series naming/timing. Direct BikeBiz article and official Avinox MG Concept source were not found in this pass.
limits_or_caveats: Do not treat BikeBiz timing or Avinox MG Concept official specs as directly verified.
